title: UK sends warship and drone-busting helicopters to the Eastern Mediterranean to protect Brits and allies in the region

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: UK sends warship and drone-busting helicopters to the Eastern Mediterranean to protect Brits and allies in the region. HMS Dragon set to sail to the Eastern Mediterranean to defend British interests and support the collective self-defence of our allies.

sourceReferences.citationText: mod-press-office – UK sends warship and drone-busting helicopters to the Eastern Mediterranean to protect Brits and allies in the region
